pr.title: Non-record: Depth Recurrence + GPTQ + SGD TTT (1.1172, 1xH100)

output.summary: Shares 7 transformer blocks via depth recurrence with XSA skips, GPTQ mixed-bit quant, and SGD all-weight test-time training.
techniques: Depth recurrence sharing 7 unique blocks across 13 effective layers with XSA/U-Net skip connections
Hessian-compensated GPTQ with mixed int5/6/8 quantization
SGD all-weights test-time training per document on 2048-token chunks
